elementClick.name: THEME_TOGGLE
elementClick.customFunction: var curr = localStorage.getItem('wiloTheme') || 'dark'; var next = curr === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark'; localStorage.setItem('wiloTheme', next); var el = $event ? $event.target : document.getElementById('THEME_TOGGLE'); if (!el) return; while (el && el.id !== 'THEME_TOGGLE') el = el.parentElement; if (!el) return; var root = el; while (root.parentElement) { if (root.getAttribute && root.getAttribute('style') && root.getAttribute('style').indexOf('min-height') > -1) break; root = root.parentElement; } var isL = next === 'light'; var h2r = function(h) { if (!h || h.charAt(0) !== '#') return null; h = h.replace('#',''); if (h.length === 3) h = h[0]+h[0]+h[1]+h[1]+h[2]+h[2]; var n = parseInt(h,16); return 'rgb(' + (n>>16) + ', ' + ((n>>8)&255) + ', ' + (n&255) + ')'; }; var pairs = [ ['#2a2a32','#f0f2f5'], ['#e8e8ec','#1a1a2e'], ['#a0a0aa','#555566'], ['#707080','#8888a0'], ['#ffb400','#e6a200'], ['#363640','#ccccd5'], ['#2a3a3f','#c8e6e0'], ['#3a5a5f','#a0d4ca'] ]; var map = {}; for (var i = 0; i < pairs.length; i++) { var dk = pairs[i][0], lt = pairs[i][1]; var dkR = h2r(dk), ltR = h2r(lt); if (isL) { map[dk] = lt; map[dk.toUpperCase()] = lt; if (dkR) map[dkR] = lt; map[dkR ? dkR.replace(/ /g,'') : ''] = lt; } else { map[lt] = dk; map[lt.toUpperCase()] = dk; if (ltR) map[ltR] = dk; map[ltR ? ltR.replace(/ /g,'') : ''] = dk; } } var rgbaPairs = [ ['rgba(54, 54, 64, 0.9)','rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95)'], ['rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02)','rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03)'], ['rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04)','rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)'], ['rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)','rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)'], ['rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06)','rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)'], ['rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)','rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)'], ['rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15)','rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)'], ['rgba(0, 156, 130, 0.06)','rgba(0, 156, 130, 0.1)'], ['rgba(0, 156, 130, 0.1)','rgba(0, 156, 130, 0.15)'], ['rgba(255, 180, 0, 0.15)','rgba(255, 180, 0, 0.2)'], ['rgba(0, 156, 130, 0.15)','rgba(0, 156, 130, 0.2)'] ]; for (var k = 0; k < rgbaPairs.length; k++) { var rdk = rgbaPairs[k][0], rlt = rgbaPairs[k][1]; var rdk2 = rdk.replace(/ /g,''), rlt2 = rlt.replace(/ /g,''); if (isL) { map[rdk] = rlt; map[rdk2] = rlt; } else { map[rlt] = rdk; map[rlt2] = rdk; } } var swp = function(v) { return v && map[v] ? map[v] : null; }; var swpStr = function(s) { if (!s) return null; var changed = false; var r = s; for (var key in map) { if (key && r.indexOf(key) > -1) { r = r.split(key).join(map[key]); changed = true; } } return changed ? r : null; }; var all = root.querySelectorAll('*'); var styleProps = ['color','backgroundColor','borderColor','borderTopColor','borderBottomColor','borderLeftColor','borderRightColor']; for (var m = 0; m < all.length; m++) { var node = all[m]; var st = node.style; for (var p = 0; p < styleProps.length; p++) { var val = st[styleProps[p]]; var nv = swp(val); if (nv) st[styleProps[p]] = nv; } var bgVal = st.background; if (bgVal) { var nbg = swpStr(bgVal); if (nbg) st.background = nbg; } var brd = st.border; if (brd) { var nb = swpStr(brd); if (nb) st.border = nb; } var bsh = st.boxShadow; if (bsh) { var nbs = swpStr(bsh); if (nbs) st.boxShadow = nbs; } if (node.namespaceURI && node.namespaceURI.indexOf('svg') > -1) { var attrs = ['fill','stroke','stop-color']; for (var a = 0; a < attrs.length; a++) { var av = node.getAttribute(attrs[a]); var nav = swp(av); if (nav) node.setAttribute(attrs[a], nav); } } } root.style.background = isL ? '#f0f2f5' : '#2a2a32'; root.style.color = isL ? '#1a1a2e' : '#e8e8ec'; var spans = el.querySelectorAll('span'); for (var j = 0; j < spans.length; j++) { var t = spans[j].textContent; if (t === 'Oscuro') spans[j].textContent = 'Claro'; else if (t === 'Claro') spans[j].textContent = 'Oscuro'; else if (t === '\u263e') spans[j].textContent = '\u2600'; else if (t === '\u2600') spans[j].textContent = '\u263e'; } var togBg = el.querySelector('div[style*="border-radius: 9px"], div[style*="border-radius:9px"]'); if (togBg) togBg.style.background = isL ? 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)'; var knob = togBg ? togBg.querySelector('div') : null; if (knob) knob.style.left = isL ? '16px' : '2px'; el.style.background = isL ? 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)';
